SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver

Interface VirtualServer

All Superinterfaces:
EventListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
RMIVirtualServer, TCPVirtualServer
public interface VirtualServer extends EventListener
This interface is used to define the methods that the VirtualServer must implement.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    askLobbies()
    This method is used to ask the server to send the list of the available lobbies.
    void
    chooseObjective(String player, int cardId)
    This method is used to make the player choose the objective.
    void
    chooseToken(String player, Token token)
    This method is used to make the player choose the token.
    void
    createLobby(String nick, int numPlayers)
    This method is used to create a new lobby.
    void
    drawCardFromAvailable(String player, int cardId)
    This method is used to make the player draw a card from the available cards.
    void
    drawCardFromDeck(String player, String deck)
    This method is used to make the player draw a card from the deck.
    void
    joinLobby(int hash, String nick)
    This method is used to join a lobby.
    void
    placeCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
    This method is used to make the player place a card.
    void
    placeStartCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
    This method is used to place the start card.

  • Method Details

    • createLobby

      void createLobby(String nick, int numPlayers)
      This method is used to create a new lobby.
      Parameters:
      nick - The nickname of the player that creates the lobby.
      numPlayers - The number of players that the lobby must have.

    • askLobbies

      void askLobbies()
      This method is used to ask the server to send the list of the available lobbies.

    • joinLobby

      void joinLobby(int hash, String nick)
      This method is used to join a lobby.
      Parameters:
      hash - The hash code of the lobby.
      nick - The nickname of the player that wants to join the lobby.

    • placeStartCard

      void placeStartCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
      This method is used to place the start card.
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.
      side - The side of the card.
      pos - The position of the card.

    • chooseToken

      void chooseToken(String player, Token token)
      This method is used to make the player choose the token.
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      token - The token chosen by the player.

    • chooseObjective

      void chooseObjective(String player, int cardId)
      This method is used to make the player choose the objective.
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.

    • placeCard

      void placeCard(String player, int cardId, String side, Position pos)
      This method is used to make the player place a card.
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.
      side - The side of the card.
      pos - The position of the card.

    • drawCardFromDeck

      void drawCardFromDeck(String player, String deck)
      This method is used to make the player draw a card from the deck.
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      deck - The deck from which the player will draw the card.

    • drawCardFromAvailable

      void drawCardFromAvailable(String player, int cardId)
      This method is used to make the player draw a card from the available cards.
      Parameters:
      player - The nickname of the player.
      cardId - The hash code of the card.
